acquisitions.name: Personal Guarantee for Warner Bros. Discovery Acquisition

philanthropy.name: Ellison Institute of Technology Global Fund

2026.methodology: Income forecast is based on an estimated 15-18% growth in Oracle stock price from Jan 2026 base, driven by 20% organic revenue growth reported in Q3 FY26, plus $2.32B in cash dividends (constant at $0.50/share). Spending is dominated by Ellison's disclosed $45.7B personal guarantee for the Skydance-Warner Bros. Discovery merger (March 2026), supplemented by $500M in recurring philanthropic and operational outlays for his real estate and research portfolio.

2025.methodology: Income is derived from a $57.7B increase in annual net worth (from ~$192B in Jan to ~$251B in Dec 2025 as per Bloomberg Billionaires Index) plus $2.32B in cash dividends ($0.50/share per quarter on 1.16B shares). Spending is estimated based on $300M+ in recurring philanthropic commitments, $120M in operational maintenance for the island of Lānaʻi, and approximately $80M-$100M in reported political and strategic contributions during the 2025-2026 cycle.

philanthropy.name: Ellison Institute of Technology & Giving Pledge

2024.methodology: Income calculated as the delta in net worth between Jan 1, 2024 ($107B) and Dec 31, 2024 (~$141B) plus $2B in annual cash dividends (calculated as $0.40/share per quarter on 1.16B shares) and $8.3M compensation. Spending estimated based on reported $100M+ annual philanthropic commitments, $100M+ operational costs for the island of Lanai, and recurring maintenance of real estate portfolio valued over $1B.
